name: playground
custom_css: .screen-inner{border-radius:28px;border:3px solid var(--c-border);box-shadow:0 8px 0 -2px var(--c-border)} .screen-title{font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.01em} .btn-primary,.btn-check{border-radius:999px;font-weight:800;box-shadow:0 4px 0 -1px color-mix(in srgb,var(--c-primary) 60%,#000);transform:translateY(0);transition:transform .1s,box-shadow .1s} .btn-primary:active,.btn-check:active{transform:translateY(3px);box-shadow:0 1px 0 -1px color-mix(in srgb,var(--c-primary) 60%,#000)} .opt,.branch-choice,.scen-choice{border-radius:18px;border-width:2.5px} .opt:hover,.branch-choice:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)} .points-hud,.level-hud{font-weight:800;font-size:14px}
